title: Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike: mock Joni LinkedIn post generation stream...

goal.value: Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike: mock Joni LinkedIn post generation streams into a collaborative TipTap/Yjs document. No production deploy or real LinkedIn/Hermes mutation.

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String:
set -eu
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
cat > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.prompt.md <<'PROMPT'
# Review the Joni + TipTap collaborative editor spike

Review `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo` against `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`.

Approve only if all are true:
1. It is a small standalone local spike.
2. It uses TipTap for the editor.
3. It uses Yjs/Hocuspocus or equivalent local collaboration so two browser sessions can share one document.
4. It has a mock Joni SSE stream producing LinkedIn-post-like chunks.
5. The UI can stream mock chunks into the TipTap document.
6. README documents setup, run commands, two-window verification, architecture, limitations, and next steps for real Hermes/Joni streaming.
7. `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, and `npm run build` pass, or optional missing scripts are intentionally absent and compatible with `--if-present`.
8. No secrets, real LinkedIn, customer data, public publishing, or production deploy behavior.

Run verification commands yourself. Write `.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md`.

First line must be exactly one of:
- `VERDICT: APPROVED`
- `VERDICT: REJECTED`

Then include evidence commands run, files inspected, risks, and next steps. If rejected, list the smallest fixes needed.
PROMPT
UX_USE_MOBBIN_MCP=false CODEX_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=3600000 node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.prompt.md --stage joni-tiptap-review --out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/codex-review.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.rendered.md --last-message-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.last-message.md --model gpt-5.3-codex

set -eu
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
cat > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.prompt.md <<'PROMPT'
# Implement the Joni + TipTap collaborative editor spike

You are running inside a Fabro Daytona worker in the Maestro repo. Build the smallest useful throwaway spike, not a production product.

Read the source plan first: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`.

Create the app at `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo`.

Required scope:
- Standalone local demo only.
- React + TypeScript or React + JSX with Vite.
- TipTap editor.
- Yjs/Hocuspocus collaboration so two browser sessions share/edit one doc.
- Mock Joni SSE endpoint such as `GET /api/joni/stream?topic=...` returning LinkedIn-post-like chunks.
- UI: user enters a topic, clicks \u201cAsk Joni\u201d, mock stream chunks insert into the TipTap document, and a second browser tab/window sees the same document.
- README with setup, run commands, two-window manual verification, architecture notes, limitations, and next steps for swapping mock Joni for real Hermes/Joni streaming.
- Build/typecheck/test scripts compatible with: `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, `npm run build`.

Forbidden:
- No real Hermes/Joni call.
- No real LinkedIn auth, posting, scraping, importing, customer data, deploy, or outbound mutation.
- No secrets.

When done, leave changed files in the workspace and summarize verification commands run in your final Codex message.
PROMPT
UX_USE_MOBBIN_MCP=false CODEX_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=3600000 node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.prompt.md --stage joni-tiptap-implement --out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/codex-implement.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.rendered.md --last-message-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.last-message.md --model gpt-5.3-codex

APP='spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo'; GOAL='docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md'; mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike "$APP"; test -s "$GOAL"; cp "$GOAL" .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/goal.md; printf '{"app_dir":"%s","goal_path":"%s"}
' "$APP" "$GOAL" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/input.json; echo joni-tiptap-spike-prepared

set -eu
APP='spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo'
test -d "$APP"
test -f "$APP/package.json"
test -f "$APP/README.md"
(cd "$APP" && npm install && npm run typecheck --if-present && npm test --if-present && npm run build)
grep -Eiq 'Joni|TipTap|Tiptap|collab|stream|Hocuspocus|Yjs' "$APP/README.md"
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
printf '# CI Report

status=ok
app_dir=%s
verified_at=%s
' "$APP" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/ci-report.md
echo native-verification-ok

goal.String: Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike: mock Joni LinkedIn post generation streams into a collaborative TipTap/Yjs document. No production deploy or real LinkedIn/Hermes mutation.

spec.graph_source:
digraph JoniTipTapSpikeCodexCommand {
    graph [
        goal="Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike with streaming mock LinkedIn post generation",
        persona="code-factory",
        inputs="goal_path, app_dir",
        outputs="app_dir, review_report, handoff_json",
        default_max_retries=1,
        retry_target="implement",
        fallback_retry_target="implement"
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    prepare [
        label="Prepare Spike Workspace",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="prepare",
        script="APP='{{ inputs.app_dir|default('spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo') }}'; GOAL='{{ inputs.goal_path|default('docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md') }}'; mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike "$APP"; test -s "$GOAL"; cp "$GOAL" .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/goal.md; printf '{"app_dir":"%s","goal_path":"%s"}
' "$APP" "$GOAL" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/input.json; echo joni-tiptap-spike-prepared"
    ]

    implement [
        label="Implement Spike via Codex CLI",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        timeout="7200s",
        script="set -eu
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
cat > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.prompt.md <<'PROMPT'
# Implement the Joni + TipTap collaborative editor spike

You are running inside a Fabro Daytona worker in the Maestro repo. Build the smallest useful throwaway spike, not a production product.

Read the source plan first: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`.

Create the app at `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo`.

Required scope:
- Standalone local demo only.
- React + TypeScript or React + JSX with Vite.
- TipTap editor.
- Yjs/Hocuspocus collaboration so two browser sessions share/edit one doc.
- Mock Joni SSE endpoint such as `GET /api/joni/stream?topic=...` returning LinkedIn-post-like chunks.
- UI: user enters a topic, clicks “Ask Joni”, mock stream chunks insert into the TipTap document, and a second browser tab/window sees the same document.
- README with setup, run commands, two-window manual verification, architecture notes, limitations, and next steps for swapping mock Joni for real Hermes/Joni streaming.
- Build/typecheck/test scripts compatible with: `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, `npm run build`.

Forbidden:
- No real Hermes/Joni call.
- No real LinkedIn auth, posting, scraping, importing, customer data, deploy, or outbound mutation.
- No secrets.

When done, leave changed files in the workspace and summarize verification commands run in your final Codex message.
PROMPT
UX_USE_MOBBIN_MCP=false CODEX_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=3600000 node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.prompt.md --stage joni-tiptap-implement --out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/codex-implement.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.rendered.md --last-message-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.last-message.md --model gpt-5.3-codex"
    ]

    verify [
        label="Native Verification",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        timeout="1800s",
        script="set -eu
APP='spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo'
test -d "$APP"
test -f "$APP/package.json"
test -f "$APP/README.md"
(cd "$APP" && npm install && npm run typecheck --if-present && npm test --if-present && npm run build)
grep -Eiq 'Joni|TipTap|Tiptap|collab|stream|Hocuspocus|Yjs' "$APP/README.md"
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
printf '# CI Report

status=ok
app_dir=%s
verified_at=%s
' "$APP" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/ci-report.md
echo native-verification-ok"
    ]

    review [
        label="Codex Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        timeout="7200s",
        script="set -eu
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
cat > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.prompt.md <<'PROMPT'
# Review the Joni + TipTap collaborative editor spike

Review `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo` against `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`.

Approve only if all are true:
1. It is a small standalone local spike.
2. It uses TipTap for the editor.
3. It uses Yjs/Hocuspocus or equivalent local collaboration so two browser sessions can share one document.
4. It has a mock Joni SSE stream producing LinkedIn-post-like chunks.
5. The UI can stream mock chunks into the TipTap document.
6. README documents setup, run commands, two-window verification, architecture, limitations, and next steps for real Hermes/Joni streaming.
7. `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, and `npm run build` pass, or optional missing scripts are intentionally absent and compatible with `--if-present`.
8. No secrets, real LinkedIn, customer data, public publishing, or production deploy behavior.

Run verification commands yourself. Write `.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md`.

First line must be exactly one of:
- `VERDICT: APPROVED`
- `VERDICT: REJECTED`

Then include evidence commands run, files inspected, risks, and next steps. If rejected, list the smallest fixes needed.
PROMPT
UX_USE_MOBBIN_MCP=false CODEX_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=3600000 node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.prompt.md --stage joni-tiptap-review --out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/codex-review.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.rendered.md --last-message-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.last-message.md --model gpt-5.3-codex"
    ]

    review_gate [
        label="Review Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        script="set -eu
test -s .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md
grep -Eq '^VERDICT:[[:space:]]*APPROVED' .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md
echo review-approved"
    ]

    handoff [
        label="Publish Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="review",
        script="set -eu
APP='spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo'
node - <<'NODE'
const fs = require('fs');
const cp = require('child_process');
const app = 'spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo';
const out = {
  kind: 'joni_tiptap_spike_handoff',
  app_dir: app,
  ci_report: '.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/ci-report.md',
  review: '.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md',
  status: 'approved',
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
};
try {
  out.git_status = cp.execSync('git status --short', {encoding: 'utf8'}).trim().split('
').filter(Boolean).slice(0, 80);
} catch {}
fs.mkdirSync('.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike', {recursive: true});
fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/handoff.json', JSON.stringify(out, null, 2) + '
');
console.log(JSON.stringify(out));
NODE"
    ]

    start -> prepare
    prepare -> implement [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    prepare -> prepare [loop_restart=true]
    implement -> verify [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement -> implement [loop_restart=true]
    verify -> review [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify -> implement [label="Fix"]
    review -> review_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    review -> implement [label="Fix"]
    review_gate -> handoff [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    review_gate -> implement [label="Fix"]
    handoff -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    handoff -> review [label="Fix"]
}

script_invocation.script:
set -eu
mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike
cat > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.prompt.md <<'PROMPT'
# Implement the Joni + TipTap collaborative editor spike

You are running inside a Fabro Daytona worker in the Maestro repo. Build the smallest useful throwaway spike, not a production product.

Read the source plan first: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`.

Create the app at `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo`.

Required scope:
- Standalone local demo only.
- React + TypeScript or React + JSX with Vite.
- TipTap editor.
- Yjs/Hocuspocus collaboration so two browser sessions share/edit one doc.
- Mock Joni SSE endpoint such as `GET /api/joni/stream?topic=...` returning LinkedIn-post-like chunks.
- UI: user enters a topic, clicks \u201cAsk Joni\u201d, mock stream chunks insert into the TipTap document, and a second browser tab/window sees the same document.
- README with setup, run commands, two-window manual verification, architecture notes, limitations, and next steps for swapping mock Joni for real Hermes/Joni streaming.
- Build/typecheck/test scripts compatible with: `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, `npm run build`.

Forbidden:
- No real Hermes/Joni call.
- No real LinkedIn auth, posting, scraping, importing, customer data, deploy, or outbound mutation.
- No secrets.

When done, leave changed files in the workspace and summarize verification commands run in your final Codex message.
PROMPT
UX_USE_MOBBIN_MCP=false CODEX_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=3600000 node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.prompt.md --stage joni-tiptap-implement --out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/codex-implement.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.rendered.md --last-message-out .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/implement.last-message.md --model gpt-5.3-codex

exec 2>&1
set -eu
